title: teucrium thymifolium subsp. fraternum
intro: Teucrium thymifolium subsp. fraternum, also known as Fraternal Wood Mint, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium thymifolium subsp. fraternum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
